titleStmt.title: SII 26.727: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 727. (A.R. No. 676 of 1909.) TIRUNEḌUṄGAḶAM, LALGUDI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

p.hi: Vīra-Rāyaṇa-uḍaiyār, son of Bhūpati-uḍaiyār: Ś. 1334, Nandana, Mithuna (Āṉi) ba. 9, Friday, Rēvati = 1412 A.D., June 3.

summary.p: This inscription is damaged in some places.

It records a gift of land, made by the king, in Tiruneḍuṅgaḷam a certain stone-mason named Tambikkunallār, son of Śoṉṉavaṇṇañśeyvār, who had attended to the construction and repairs to the temple of the god of the place several times. It also records a gift of house to the same mason.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī.man mahāmaṇḍaliśvaran hariyarāya vibhāṭan śrībhūpati Uṭaiyar kumārar- śrīvirairāyaṇa Uṭaiyar prithivirājyam paṇṇiyaruḷāniṉṟa śakābdam 1000 3 100 3 10 4ṉ mel cellāniṉṟa nandanavarṣattu mithuna nāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu navamiyum veḷḷikkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa revati nāḷ Uṭaiyār tiruneṭuṅkaḷamu
ruppatiyil kāṇiyāḷāṉ kaṟṟaiccaril coṉṉavaṇṇañceyvār makaṉ tampikku nallārkkut tirumukkāṇiyum kuṭuttaruḷiṉa Iṉṉāyaṇār tirukkoyilukkut tāṉ pala tiruppaṇiyum ceytu potukaiyālum va tu Uṭa ṟayuḷḷatum tintu naṭuviṟkuḻumiyum paṇṇittantapaṭiyālum taṉakkuk kāṇiyāṭciyākat tantaruḷiṉa tiruneṭuṅkaḷattu
cantiyaraikkālukku Ellaiyāvatu tiruvitiyuntanukku meṟkkum caṭṭippurattiṟku vaṭakkum vāykku kiḻakkum taṭi 2 l nilam 2mā Innilam 6 lum tirunaṭṭapperumāḷ tiruvitiyil vaṭaciṟakil Ācaṟuti meṟttalaiyil tirunāmattukkāṇi maṉai Oṉṟiṉāṟ kiḻ mel kol muṉṟum taṉakku tirumukkāṇiyākat tanta Aḷavukku Innilam maṉaiyum can=tirātittavarai
kavum melumiṉnaāyaṉār tirukkoyilukku veṇṭum tiruppaṇiyum ceytu koyiṟ parikarattārile Oṉṟā naṭattip potavum §
Digital edition of SII 26.727 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
